zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Everard於1473年出生在英國素福爾可迪斯頓時，他的父親John Everard26歲，母親Margaret Dale22歲。他於大約1498年與Olyve Parker在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1561年11月29日在英國艾可馬申波利享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Everard于1473年出生在英国素福爾可迪斯頓时，他的父亲John Everard26岁，母亲Margaret Dale22岁。他于大约1498年与Olyve Parker在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1561年11月29日在英国艾可馬申波利享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Everard was born in 1473, in Chediston, Suffolk, England, his father, John Everard, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Dale, was 22. He married Olyve Parker about 1498, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 November 1561, in Mashbury, Essex, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Everard est né en 1473, à Chediston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Everard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Dale, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Olyve Parker environ 1498, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1561, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Everardが1473年にイギリススフォルクチェディストンで生まれた時，父John Everardは26歳，母Margaret Daleは22歳であった。約1498年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでOlyve Parkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1561年11月29日にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Everard(이)가 1473년 영국 수폴크 체디스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Everard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Dale(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Olyve Parker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1561년 11월 29일 영국 에세스 마스h버이에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Everard nasceu em 1473, em Chediston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Everard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Dale, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Olyve Parker aproximadamente 1498, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1561, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Everard родился в 1473 г. в местности чедистон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Everard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Dale, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Olyve Parker около 1498 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 ноября 1561 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.
